## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (existing functionality affected)
- [ ] 📚 Docs update
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore

## Affects

- [ ] `apps/web` (cartwright.app site)
- [ ] `apps/cli` (create-cartwright)
- [ ] `packages/shared`
- [ ] `.github/` workflows or templates
- [ ] Repo-level docs (README/CONTRIBUTING/etc)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (if test added/changed)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if CLI behavior changed
- [ ] Updated relevant docs page (if user-facing)
